summary: Start Generator integration planning after Researcher design

details.tier_reason: Planning and design only; no product/runtime code implementation in this step.
details.branch_omission_reason: Planning and design only; no generated code changes in this step.

next_action: Review guides and repository structure, then present Generator integration design to the user.

details.finding: No dedicated harness runtime exists yet; Generator integration should first formalize the Analyst-to-Generator handoff contract and execution gates before adding automation.
details.planned_boundary: Design-only step now; implementation should be a separate Tier2 guide/runtime task if files beyond logs/spec are changed.

next_action: Report the proposed Generator integration sequence and wait for user direction.

summary: Clarified isolated Claude CLI invocation model for Generator

details.decision: Analyst should invoke Generator as a fresh Claude CLI execution with a task-scoped handoff file, not as a continuation of Analyst context.
context_isolation_rules: Provide only Task Spec, selected ledger events, selected session excerpts, Research Summary snippets, target files, constraints, and expected output schema.
Do not pass the full Analyst conversation, full repository history, unrelated ledgers, or Validator private context.
Write handoff and result artifacts under a task-scoped path such as tasks/handoffs/TASK-ID/generator-input.json and generator-result.json when implementation begins.
Record the exact command shape, sandbox assumptions, model/tool identity, and artifact paths in the ledger without secrets.
details.open_point: Exact Claude CLI command flags should be verified against the installed CLI before implementation.

next_action: Explain the Claude CLI Generator invocation design to the user.

summary: Completed Generator integration planning and opened implementation task

details.completion_note: Planning concluded with isolated Claude CLI invocation model; implementation continues in TASK-20260427-092.
